name: rootloom
description: Make OpenAI Codex show its work: scoped changes, root-cause review, explicit guidance, and evidence-honest verification.

interface.shortDescription: Scoped, evidence-honest engineering for OpenAI Codex.
interface.longDescription: Rootloom is a local, inspectable OpenAI Codex engineering workflow for scoped changes, root-cause review, explicit AGENTS.md guidance, and honest verification records. Everyday Change, Review, and Guidance stay lightweight; Autonomy and bounded Evidence are optional, and Project Memory remains experimental.
defaultPrompt: Fix this defect at its owning boundary and verify the primary, invariant, and adjacent paths.
Review this change and separate suggested checks from verification that actually ran.
Create concise, evidence-backed AGENTS.md guidance for this repository.
